data.title: Court froze 70.6 Bitcoin linked to BlockFills case after Dominion Capital claimed fund misuse.
data.description: A total of 70.6 Bitcoins linked to BlockFills have been placed on hold by a federal judge. This action was taken following allegations from Dominion Capital regarding the misuse of customer funds. Dominion Capital has sought the return of disputed assets in this case.

data.title: Smoke Free Sweden: Romanian Restrictions Deprive Women of Best Tool to Quit Smoking
data.description: In Bucharest, Romania, policymakers are cautioned on International Women’s Day regarding limitations on oral nicotine pouches that could hinder women from benefiting from an innovation associated with a significant decrease in female smoking rates globally. Released alongside this warning is the report "Empowerment in a Pouch," revealing how the availability of tobacco-free nicotine pouches has hastened Sweden’s journey towards a smoke-free society, notably impacting women. This issue is crucial as it pertains to advancing women’s health and eradicating smoking-related harms.

data.title: Gap Stock Tumbles On Q4 Earnings As Double Miss Overshadows $1 Billion Buyback
data.description: Clothing retailer Gap Inc (NYSE: GAP) released its fourth-quarter financial results after the bell on Thursday. The report showed Q4 revenue at $4.236 billion, slightly below estimates of $4.244 billion. Earnings per share for the quarter were 45 cents, missing the estimated 46 cents. Net sales rose by 2% year-over-year with comparable sales increasing by 3%. While store sales remained constant, online sales saw a 5% growth from the previous year, accounting for 42% of total net sales. Comparable sales for the various brands were as follows: Old Navy and Gap both saw a 3% increase, Banana Republic had a 4% increase, and Athleta experienced a decline. Gap Inc's stock has been under pressure due to the reported earnings missing estimates. More details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Embraer S.A. Announces MATERIAL FACT
data.description: SAO PAULO, March 5, 2026 - Aircraft manufacturer EMBRAER S.A. (B3: EMBJ3, NYSE: EMBJ) has released its projections for 2026 in accordance with CVM Resolution No. 44/2021 and CVM Resolution No. 44/2022. The company anticipates delivering 80-85 aircraft in the Commercial Aviation sector and has provided full details of its projections on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Smoke Free Sweden: Legal Limbo for Nicotine Pouches Deprives Argentina’s Women of Best Tool to Quit Smoking
data.description: In Buenos Aires, Argentina, policymakers are being advised on International Women’s Day to address the lack of regulation concerning oral nicotine pouches, a product linked to a significant reduction in female smoking rates globally. A report titled Empowerment in a Pouch has been released in conjunction with this warning, highlighting how tobacco-free nicotine pouches have played a pivotal role in Sweden's journey towards becoming smoke-free, especially for women. The report emphasizes the potential benefits of regulating these pouches in Argentina, underscoring the positive impact they could have on public health, particularly for female smokers.
